title: Fix YouTube OAuth connection state — shows connected then immediately reports disconnected

requirements.text: Fix the YouTube/Google OAuth connection flow so that after a successful OAuth callback the connection state is correctly persisted and reflected in the UI as connected. The current bug causes the app to briefly show a connected state and then revert to showing disconnected, even though the OAuth credentials were processed.

quotes: The YouTube connect don't connect it connects then says it isn't connected
No it don't connect it connects then says it isn't connected

acceptanceCriteria: After completing the Google OAuth consent flow and being redirected back to the app, the YouTube channel connection status is shown as connected and remains connected.
The connection status does not flip back to disconnected immediately after a successful OAuth callback.
Refreshing the page after connecting still shows the channel as connected.
The ChannelConnection component correctly reflects the persisted OAuth credentials from the backend.

requirements.text: Fix the OAuthCallback page to reliably wait for backend actor initialization before processing and storing OAuth credentials. If the actor is not ready within the timeout window, surface a clear, actionable error rather than silently failing or incorrectly reporting the connection as failed.

quotes: The YouTube connect don't connect it connects then says it isn't connected

acceptanceCriteria: The OAuthCallback page does not attempt to store credentials before the actor is fully initialized.
If the actor is not ready within the timeout, a clear error message is shown to the user explaining what happened.
After credentials are stored via the mutation hook, the OAuthCallback page redirects to the main page with connection state already set to connected.
The useYouTubeChannel hook's connection status query is invalidated/refetched after credentials are successfully stored so the UI immediately reflects the connected state.

requirements.text: Ensure the useYouTubeChannel hook's connection status check query is invalidated and refetched after the OAuth credential save mutation completes successfully, so the ChannelConnection component immediately reads the correct connected state from the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: After the storeGoogleOAuthCredentials mutation succeeds, all YouTube connection-related React Query cache entries are invalidated.
The ChannelConnection component fetches fresh connection status from the backend and displays the channel as connected without requiring a manual page refresh.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change the backend OAuth credential storage logic unless a backend bug is confirmed as the root cause.
nonGoals: Changing the OAuth provider or authentication method.
Redesigning the ChannelConnection UI beyond fixing the connection state display.
